category_title: Struggling Chamorro readers and writers in collaborative settings
scenario_title: Peer interruption and turn-taking conflicts during oral retelling
minimal_context: The students are in a small group practicing reading and retelling the tale 'The Old Lady in the Vinegar Bottle' to one another.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time to practice reading and retelling 'The Old Lady in the Vinegar Bottle' to one another in your small group.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: It's not your turn, it's my turn, it's not your turn.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please decide who will go first.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Listen quietly while he begins to retell the story.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Juan, you're supposed to start from the beginning.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time to practice reading and retelling 'The Old Lady in the Vinegar Bottle' to one another in your small group.

STUDENT: It's not your turn, it's my turn, it's not your turn.

TUTOR: Please decide who will go first.

STUDENT: Okay whose turn? Your turn.

TUTOR: Listen quietly while he begins to retell the story.

STUDENT: Juan, you're supposed to start from the beginning.

task.content: Practice reading and retelling a favorite tale titled 'The Old Lady in the Vinegar Bottle' to one another
task.learning_goal: To help remember and understand what you read or what is read to you, starting from the beginning to the end of the story

context.environment: Collaborative setting conducive to working together in the spirit of inafa'maolek
context.materials: Individual copies of the legend, Brown and Cambourne's book Read and Retell (1990)
context.social_setting: Small group of three or four people

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When a peer begins to retell the story but does not start from the beginning
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Interrupts the reteller immediately to correct them
related_quotes: Juan, you're supposed to start from the beginning.

behavior_patterns.condition: When determining whose turn it is to participate in a group
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Complain and fight about whose turn it is
related_quotes: It's not your turn, it's my turn, it's not your turn.
